assist2PlayerId.description: Gets or sets the ID of the secondary assist player, if any.

notes.description: Gets or sets optional notes about the goal.

UpdateGoalRequest.description: Request to update an existing goal. All fields are replaced.

title.description: Gets or sets the track title.

artist.description: Gets or sets the artist name, if known.

trackId.description: Gets or sets the provider-specific track id used to match player requests, if tagged.

providerType.description: Gets or sets which provider BoltonCup.WebAPI.Mapping.UpdateMusicTrackRequest.TrackId belongs to.

albumArtUrl.description: Gets or sets the album art URL, if known.

durationMs.description: Gets or sets the track duration in milliseconds, if known.

isInBasePool.description: Gets or sets whether this track plays in every game as part of the base pool.

UpdateMusicTrackRequest.description: Request to update a music library track's metadata or base-pool flag.

teamId.description: Gets or sets the ID of the penalized team.

period.description: Gets or sets the period number.

periodLabel.description: Gets or sets the period label (e.g. "1st", "OT").

periodTimeRemaining.description: Gets or sets the time remaining in the period when the penalty was called.

playerId.description: Gets or sets the ID of the penalized player.

infractionName.description: Gets or sets the infraction name (e.g. "Tripping", "Hooking").

durationMinutes.description: Gets or sets the penalty duration in minutes.

notes.description: Gets or sets optional notes about the penalty.

UpdatePenaltyRequest.description: Request to update an existing penalty. All fields are replaced.

gameAvailability.description: Gets or sets the player's availability for each of their team's games.

song.description: Gets or sets the player's song request, if one has been selected.

UpdateTournamentPlayerInfoRequest.description: Request to create or update the authenticated user's pre-tournament player info.

VerifyPasswordResetCodeRequest.description: Request payload for verifying a password reset code.
